levelName: Level 70: While Loop Boss - Fibonacci Filter
puzzleDescription: The final While Loop challenge! You must calculate the Fibonacci sequence for N terms, but the display terminal is glitched and only accepts EVEN numbers. If a calculated number is odd, skip the print but continue the sequence logic.
objective: Input a number N. Print only the EVEN numbers found within the first N terms of the Fibonacci sequence (starting 0, 1).
hints: Use 'if (a % 2 == 0)' to filter for even numbers.
The Fibonacci update logic (next = a + b) must happen every loop, regardless of the 'if' condition.
Remember: count++ must run every iteration so the loop eventually stops at N.
